extract: Mudkip (Japanese: ミズゴロウ Mizugorou) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves into Marshtomp starting at level 16, which evolves into Swampert starting at level 36. Along with Treecko and Torchic, Mudkip is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Hoenn available at the beginning of Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, Omega Ruby, and Alpha Sapphire.
